negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: common_sense_c8cd4cd9-1f1e-4fcd-ad06-fe1cc7061564
prompt: A young woman with long, straight red-brown hair is seen in a softly lit, warmly ambient setting. Her hair elegantly drapes over her left shoulder, the ends slightly curled, while her dark eyes engage the camera. She wears a boat neck shirt with a solid black upper section that transitions to a red below her mid-chest, with red trim accentuating the design. A delicate necklace rests around her neck, adding to her appearance. Her posture is relaxed, with her arms extended downward and coming close together. Throughout the sequence, she maintains a soft smile, her lips curved. She begins by opening her eyes and gazing directly at the camera, before blinking and shifting her gaze to the right. After a moment, she looks back to the camera, briefly lowering her eyes, then tilting her head to the left as she gazes up again. Finally, she places her right hand near her lips, her fingers curled with her index finger lightly touching her mouth while maintaining a steady, focused look at the camera. The setting has a warm, dimly lit ambiance, with a brick wall faintly visible to the left and a transparent panel on her right gently catching the light. Behind her, a blurry wall and slightly colorful panels are faintly visible. The lighting casts a golden glow over her skin and hair, highlighting her natural beauty. The video is captured in a medium shot at eye level, the camera initially static, then panning to the right, before adopting random movements.
